description: Shared QAS and PRD mapping. SSE shows the raw VLM result until the SOP dashboard API provides a valid step; then Cosmos Action Description shows long_description for that step.

mappings.vlm_training_label: After loosening, tighten the screws in the correct position to secure the TOP Bianca sub-panel to fix the PCBA (manually tighten the screws).
mappings.long_description: After loosening, tighten the screws in the correct position to secure the TOP Bianca sub-panel to fix the PCBA (manually tighten the screws).

mappings.vlm_training_label: After loosening, tighten the screws in the correct position to secure the BOT Bianca sub-panel to fix the PCBA (manually tighten the screws).
mappings.long_description: After loosening, tighten the screws in the correct position to secure the BOT Bianca sub-panel to fix the PCBA (manually tighten the screws).

mappings.vlm_training_label: Loosen TOP Bianca coldplate iron frame screws*6 in order 1~6 and remove coldplate iron frame
mappings.long_description: Loosen TOP Bianca coldplate iron frame screws*6 in order 1~6 and remove coldplate iron frame

mappings.vlm_training_label: Loosen BOT Bianca coldplate iron frame screws*6 in order 1~6 and remove coldplate iron frame
mappings.long_description: Loosen BOT Bianca coldplate iron frame screws*6 in order 1~6 and remove coldplate iron frame

mappings.vlm_training_label: Put the cover on the first NV Link connector.
mappings.long_description: Put the cover on the first NV Link connector.

mappings.vlm_training_label: Put the cover on the second NV Link connector.
mappings.long_description: Put the cover on the second NV Link connector.

mappings.vlm_training_label: Cover the third NV Link connector.
mappings.long_description: Cover the third NV Link connector.

mappings.vlm_training_label: Cover the fourth NV Link connector.
mappings.long_description: Cover the fourth NV Link connector.
